name: project-doc-orchestrator
description: Bundle the Project Doc Orchestrator skill as a reusable Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Refresh current-project docs from real repo evidence
interface.longDescription: Inspects the active repository, builds an evidence-backed snapshot, and refreshes the managed README, PLAN, LAYOUT, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG, and GUIDE docs in parallel lanes.
defaultPrompt: Refresh docs/project-docs for the current repo after code changes.
Inspect this repository and rebuild the managed project docs bundle.
Update README, PLAN, LAYOUT, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG, and GUIDE from real repo evidence.
